cards.title: Daily Blog Post
cards.description: Write about yesterdays RE news + current mortgage rates

cards.title: MLS Review
cards.description: Check new listings, expired listings, closed listings. Share standouts with buyers.

cards.title: Social Media Threads
cards.description: Social Media Dashboard built (thht-social.onrender.com). Fiona drafts → Chris approves → auto-publish via Late ($33/mo).

cards.title: Prospecting Block
cards.description: Door flyers, cold calls (RedX), or expired listing calls

cards.title: Lead Follow-Up System
cards.description: Follow-up reminder system built into CRM. Flags leads needing follow-up based on last activity date.

cards.title: Audrey Cross-Referral Strategy
cards.description: Develop referral pipeline between Audreys photography clients and RE business

cards.title: NH House Hunt
cards.description: Monitor 5-bedroom listings in Southern NH (~35 min from Townsend, MA). Need in-law suite.

cards.title: Daily Blog Draft for Chris
cards.description: Prepare daily blog draft matching thehooverhometeam.com/blog format. RE news + mortgage rates. Included in morning brief.

cards.title: Get BlueHost Access
cards.description: WordPress API access configured. Fiona Murphy (marketing agent) handles blog publishing directly.

cards.title: Text Prospecting System (Twilio)
cards.description: OpenPhone integrated for calls. SMS blocked — A2P Campaign registration still pending approval. Text prospecting via OpenPhone once approved.

cards.title: Study Ricky Carruth Content
cards.description: Watch Ricky Carruth YouTube (youtube.com/@RickyCarruth). Learn prospecting systems, phone scripts, Zero to Diamond methodology.

cards.title: RPR Property Research for Showings
cards.description: Use RPR to pull property data, RVM estimates, sales history, and comps before any client showings. Prep negotiation angles.

cards.title: Weekly Client Newsletter
cards.description: Build Ricky Carruth-style weekly newsletter for clients. BCC client list, CC Chris. Includes: personal note, mortgage rates, market insight, soft CTA. Target: Tuesday 9am EST. Test run this week.
cards.notes: Need to confirm current status with William.

cards.title: Build Custom CRM
cards.description: CRM deployed at clientlist.onrender.com. Supabase backend, 410+ leads, pipeline stages, activity logging, OpenPhone integration, CSV import, follow-up reminders.
cards.notes: Keep it simple. Import existing client data from Google Sheet once built.

cards.title: Nolan Price - MLB Betting Agent
cards.description: MLB betting analyst agent. Studies 11 books chapter-by-chapter, extracts betting rules. Bets on totals (O/U) and spreads. 233 rules extracted, 8/11 books complete.
cards.notes: Telegram: @Nolan_Price_Bot. GitHub backup: williamstronghtth/Nolan-Price-BackUp. 3 books remaining.

cards.title: Agent Session Visibility Fix
cards.description: Enabled tools.sessions.visibility=all and tools.agentToAgent for cross-agent communication. All agents can now message each other.
cards.notes: Was blocking William for 2+ days. Fixed 2026-03-23.

cards.title: Team HQ Dashboard
cards.description: Virtual office dashboard with live chat, agent status, takeaways. Deployed at thht-hq.onrender.com.

cards.title: CRM Supabase Migration
cards.description: Migrated CRM from ephemeral JSON to Supabase Postgres. 410+ leads persisted. Survives Render redeploys.
cards.notes: Project: thht-crm on Supabase free tier

cards.title: OpenPhone Integration
cards.description: Call history UI in CRM, click-to-call links. OpenPhone API is read-only for calls (can't initiate programmatically).

cards.title: Fiona Murphy - Marketing Agent
cards.description: Marketing specialist agent. Handles social media content pipeline, blog drafts, content calendar. Connected to Social Dashboard + WordPress.

cards.title: VCPA Local Matcher - Jack Sullivan
cards.description: Volusia County public records automation. Built local matcher — 232 HIGH confidence matches from property records.
cards.notes: Jack Sullivan agent handles property lookups

cards.title: Property Alerts Phase 2
cards.description: Matching engine + MLS/RPR data source for automated buyer notifications when listings match criteria.
cards.notes: Blocked: Need MLS feed access or RPR login for listings data. Phase 1 (criteria fields + UI) complete.

cards.title: Upgrade All Agents to Opus 4.6
cards.description: Switched all agents from Opus 4.5 to Claude Opus 4.6 via agents.defaults.model.primary config.
